name: Silver and Gold Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Position oven rack in the lower third of the oven.
2. Heat oven to 375°F.
3. Mix 3 tablespoons flour and 3 tablespoons sugar in a medium-sized bowl.
4. Sift the remaining flour, 3/4 cup sugar, and salt onto waxed paper twice.
5. Beat egg whites and lemon juice in a large bowl at medium speed until soft peaks form.
6. Gradually beat in the remaining sugar until glossy peaks form.
7. Add vanilla; beat in yolks and orange rind to flour mixture in a medium-sized bowl.
8. Mix at high speed until pale yellow and ribbon forms when the beater is lifted (3 minutes).
9. Fold sifted flour mixture into egg whites in three additions.
10. Remove one-third of the white batter; fold it into the yolk mixture.
11. Alternately spoon the yellow and white batters into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
12. Run a thin, long knife through the batter, swirling to combine.
13. Bake in the 375°F oven for 35-40 minutes, until golden and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
14. Let cool on a rack.
